data.title: Software Engineering Intern
data.description: About GitHub. GitHub is the world's leading platform for software development. Role Summary: Summer 2026 internship for students pursuing a degree in Computer Science or related field. You will work with the Copilot team on developer tooling.
data.qualifications: Currently enrolled in a bachelor's or master's program in Computer Science.
data.responsibilities: Build features for GitHub Copilot and collaborate with engineers across the company.
